fields.label: Flexible Block
fields.name: flexible_block
fields.instructions: Build up the page content by adding these blocks.

sub_fields.label: Image Position
sub_fields.name: image_position
sub_fields.instructions: Half block with image on the Right / Left

sub_fields.label: Background Image or Colour Or Video
sub_fields.name: background_image_or_colour

sub_fields.label: Background Image
sub_fields.name: background_image
sub_fields.instructions: Upload the background image to this component. Higher resolutions look better, but increase page load time.  recommend using no bigger than 1920 x 1080

sub_fields.label: Background Video
sub_fields.name: background_video
sub_fields.instructions: Add the youtube url of the video you would like to play in the background

sub_fields.label: Logo / Icon
sub_fields.name: logo_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Adding in a logo or Icon to appear above the content. ( Leave content Block blank just for logo )

sub_fields.label: Content Block
sub_fields.name: content_block
sub_fields.instructions: Vertically aligned content, avoid adding images in this component, as will clash with the background image

sub_fields.label: Half Height
sub_fields.name: half_height
sub_fields.instructions: makes the component 50% height, rather than fullscreen
